nodes.name: 灰穴䳍
nodes.summary: 灰穴䳍（Cinereous tinamou，学名 Crypturellus cinereus），分类上属于Tinamiformes，并归入䳍科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。
nodes.shortSummary: 灰穴䳍（学名：Crypturellus cinereus）是䳍科穴䳍屬的一种鸟类。 特征 灰穴䳍体重约506.63克，翼长约162.4毫米，嘴峰约31毫米，喙宽度约5.2毫米，喙厚度约5.4毫米，跗蹠长约49.8毫米，尾长约55.9毫米。灰穴䳍在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密集的…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cinereous tinamou (Crypturellus cinereus), also known as brushland tinamou, is a type of ground bird found in swamp and lowland forests in northern South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cinereous tinamou (Crypturellus cinereus), also known as brushland tinamou, is a type of ground bird found in swamp and lowland forests in northern South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to southern Colombia, southern Venezuela, Suriname, Guyana, French Guiana, northern and western Brazil, eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and northern Bolivia. Within Brazil, it occupies the Amazon Basin south to Mato Grosso and east to Pará. It lives in a lowland rainforest or swamp forest, up to altitude. It also occupies second growth forest, along with bushy areas with scattered trees

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The cinereous tinamou (Crypturellus cinereus), also known as brushland tinamou, is a type of ground bird found in swamp and lowland forests in northern South America

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN classifies this tinamou as Least Concern, with an occurrence range of . It is considered the most common tinamou in Suriname, and is considered uncommon in Peru. The threat to its existence is similar to that of all forest birds, and that is deforestation and fragmentation of the remaining habitat. It is believed that it loses 14.1-17% of its habitat over 3 generations
